title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM ONE, SUBPARAGRAPHi, UNDER PROVINCIAL CAPITOLS, PARAGRAPH FOUR, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5121 / 52 OG No. 7, 3532 (July, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1464, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM ONE, SUBPARAGRAPH

i

, UNDER PROVINCIAL CAPITOLS, PARAGRAPH FOUR, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item one, subparagraph i, paragraph four, section one of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred, is amended to read as follows:

"1. Nueva Vizcaya Provincial Capitol芒聙聰(1)

Construction of Annex to

Office of Provincial Governor芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄. P5,000.00."

SEC. 2. Insert the following item as Item seven, sub-paragraph am, paragraph four, section one of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred to compensate for the deletion in the preceding section:

"(7) Diffun Municipal Town Hall

Construction芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄 芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄.. P10,000.00."

SEC. 3 This Act shall take effect upon its approval.
